lines: And so, Duke joined the Hero’s Haven staff, with reinvigorated purpose and motivation.
He dedicated all of his waking hours to renewing the good image of Hero’s Haven!
With Duke’s stylish mode of serving customers with his trusty “Gallon O’ Glock”
It gave the saloon a much-needed shot of energy.
This rise in popularity finally gave the saloon its first profits in months.
Finally allowing the haven to steer away from its reputation of an
Within a few months, the saloon’s reputation was redeemed in the eyes of the townsfolk.
Though, business took a small dip the week the article dropped.
Due to Bobby incessantly bawling his eyes out with tears of joy...
This news wasn’t pleasing to everyone, though...
Well, their leader wasn’t big on the value of ‘competition in the free market’.
With this, our story truly begins.
The true “heroism” of Hero’s Haven is about to be thoroughly tested...
